//: See ../supply-chain.md §3. Pins devDependencies to exact; runtime/peer keep ranges.

versionGroups.label: Deps that appear as both a wide peer range and a pinned dev version — ignore version unification (the lockfile still pins the resolved version). Edit this list to match your repo.

semverGroups.label: devDependencies are pinned to exact versions (supply-chain hardening)
runtime + peer deps keep author-defined ranges so consumers can dedupe
